get.description:
Begin a PKCE-protected Authorization Code flow.

Sets a short-lived ``seizu_oauth_state`` cookie carrying the PKCE
verifier, the OAuth ``state`` value, and the validated ``return_to`` URL.
Returns the IDP's authorize URL; the SPA top-level-navigates to it.

post.description:
Exchange the cookie's refresh token for a new access token.

Re-issues the session cookie with a rolling Max-Age. Returns 401 (and
clears the cookie) if the cookie is invalid or the IDP rejects the
refresh token — that's the path where the user is logged out and must
re-authenticate.

Drop the session cookie and (optionally) revoke the IDP refresh token.

Always succeeds from the user's perspective. Best-effort IDP logout
failures are logged but never block the local logout.

get.description:
Return node labels, relationship types, and property keys from the graph.

Runs fixed introspection queries without saving to query history.
Requires query:execute permission (same as the ad-hoc query console).
Return the current authenticated user's profile and resolved permissions.

post.description: Execute a validated read-only ad-hoc Cypher query.
Execute a validated read-only Cypher query authorized by a signed report token.
Re-execute a query by history ID without creating a new history entry.

get.description:
Return the authenticated user's query history, paginated newest-first.

History is strictly scoped to the calling user — other users' history is
never returned.
Return a single query history item by ID, scoped to the current user.
List all reports.
Return the latest version of the dashboard report.

put.description: Set a report as the default dashboard.

get.description: Return the latest version of a report.

delete.description: Delete a report and all its versions.

get.description: List all versions of a report.

post.description: Save a new version of a report.

get.description: Return a specific version of a report.

put.description: Update report visibility without creating a report version.

post.description: Clone a report into a new report with the given name.

get.description: Return the built-in role definitions (seizu-viewer, seizu-editor, seizu-admin).
List all user-defined roles.
Return a user-defined role by ID.

put.description: Update a user-defined role (creates a new version).

delete.description: Delete a user-defined role and all its versions.

get.description: List all versions of a user-defined role.
Return a specific version of a user-defined role.
List all scheduled queries.
Return a scheduled query by ID.
List all versions of a scheduled query.
Return a specific version of a scheduled query.
List all toolsets (built-ins first, then user-defined).
Return a toolset by ID.

put.description: Update a toolset (creates a new version).

delete.description: Delete a toolset and all its tools.

get.description: List all versions of a toolset.
Return a specific version of a toolset.
List all tools in a toolset.

post.description: Create a new tool within a toolset.

get.description: Return a tool by ID.

put.description: Update a tool (creates a new version).

post.description: Execute a tool's Cypher query with the provided arguments.

get.description: List all versions of a tool.
Return a specific version of a tool.
Return a user profile by internal user_id.

post.description: Validate a Cypher query without executing it.
Stream a chat response as an AI SDK UI Message Stream.

get.description:
Return the persisted messages for the caller's chat thread.

Lets the SPA rehydrate a conversation after a reload, since the client-side
message state is otherwise lost.
Return all chat sessions for the current user, newest first.

post.description: Create a new chat session and return it.

get.description: Return one chat session for the current user.
